Miniatures are collectible toy versions of creatures, heroes, and villains from Tyria that follow you through the world. From the Miniatures section of the Hero Panel, select one of the miniatures you've collected to join you.
Miniatures have been hidden due to rising player population.
Minidungeons are hidden places in Tyria for you to discover and explore. Riches await those who conquer these dangerous challenges!
